name: Soundhope International Muslim Academy (Soundhope Schools)
description: Muslim school group in Baruwa, Ipaja established 1995 by a retired Lagos State teacher; runs Soundhope Montessori Nursery/Primary and Soundhope Private Academy (secondary, started 2000). Cambridge associate school centre and partner of Bronston Canadian Academy; offers Nigerian, British and Canadian curricula (IGCSE, Checkpoint, Cambridge A & O Levels).
address: 7/9 Soundhope Avenue, Baruwa Inside, by Pako Bus Stop, Baruwa, Ipaja, Lagos
evidence: User-attested locally as 'Soundhope Montessori'. Edusko lists it as 'Soundhope International Muslim Academy', a secondary school in Ipaja, Lagos State — the name itself states Muslim identity. SchoolsCompass has a separate listing for 'Soundhope Montessori Primary School' at 189, Abule Egun Bus Stop, Baruwa, Ipaja (fees N50,000-N150,000/term, website given as www.soundhopeschools.net); that listing does not state Islamic identity. Own site soundhope.com.ng appeared in search results but did not resolve when fetched. Phone numbers shown on directory listings appear to be the directories' own contact lines, so phone left null.

name: The Jannah-Sprouts School
description: Nursery/primary school in Gowon Estate, Iyana-Ipaja; business registry shows it was started in 2018. Active on Instagram and Facebook with school-life posts (including Eid Mubarak greetings).
address: 2, Alowonle Street, off Sewage Road, Gowon Estate, Iyana Ipaja, Lagos
evidence: User-attested locally as 'Janah Sprout'. Nigerian business registry aggregators (b2bhint BN-2641696, ng-check) list 'THE JANNAH-SPROUTS SCHOOL, LAGOS' at 2 Alowonle Street, Gowon Estate, Iyana Ipaja, started 2018. Instagram account 'The JANNAH Sprouts School' found via search snippets only (per platform-fetch rules), including an 'Eid Mubarak' reel — consistent with Muslim identity but no source explicitly states it is an Islamic school, hence confidence capped.

name: Ummul-Khair Model Schools
description: Muslim school in Alagbado offering Western and Islamic education from creche through secondary (Ummul-Khair Model College approved by Lagos State in 2013). Runs national, British and American curricula with full Islamic etiquette teaching and memorisation of the Qur'an and Hadith.
address: Block 44, Plot 19/20, Aina Aladi Street, off AIT Station, Ilapo Estate, Alagbado, Lagos
evidence: Listed in Lagos State OEQA approved private secondary schools registry as 'UMMUL-KHAIR MODEL COLLEGE, Block 44, plot 19/20, Aina Aladi street, Ilapo Estate, Alagbado, ALIMOSHO, 2013'. Company registry aggregators show UMMUL-KHAIR MODEL SCHOOLS LTD, RC 1262579, registered 22 May 2015 at the same address. School profile pages (yaclass) describe it as a Muslim school offering Western and Islamic education, Qur'an and Hadith memorisation. Own website ummulkhairmodelschools.com.ng did not resolve when fetched.

name: Alwaarith Model School
